texto: Many years ago, Bill Gates said that one day we'd be able to click on the shoes of a character in a TV show and buy them online. Whether that happens or not, are you thinking about new ways to combine your assets in programming, customer knowledge, and technology?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Brian L. Roberts que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Many years ago, Bill Gates said that one day we'd be able to click on the shoes of a character in…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, technology, day, com foco em day e character.
